info.title: Chisto.mk API
info.description: Civic environmental platform — pollution reporting, site lifecycle, cleanup events

muted.description: Whether this notification type is muted (in-app + push)

mutedUntil.description: Optional ISO timestamp until mute is active

emailMuted.description: Whether transactional email for this type is muted

emailMutedUntil.description: Optional ISO timestamp until email mute is active

token.description: FCM device token to revoke (body param avoids logging token in URL paths)
Signed unsubscribe token from email link

phoneNumber.description: Phone number in E.164 format for future verification flows

termsAcceptedAt.description: ISO-8601 when terms were accepted on device

devCode.description: Development-only OTP when OTP_DEV_RETURN_CODE is enabled

rememberMe.description: If true, refresh token lasts longer (e.g. 30 days). If false, short-lived (e.g. 1 day).

deviceId.description: Stable per-install device identifier used to keep one active session per device.

avatarUrl.description: Signed URL for the profile avatar, if set

organizerCertifiedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the user passed the organizer toolkit quiz

termsAcceptedAt.description: ISO-8601 when terms were last accepted

requiresTermsAcceptance.description: True when the user must accept current terms before using the app

accessToken.description: Short-lived JWT access token for API authentication

refreshToken.description: Long-lived opaque refresh token for session renewal

deviceId.description: Stable browser/device identifier used to keep one active admin session per device.

rememberMe.description: When true, issue a long-lived refresh session (30 days). When false, session expires in 1 day.

tempToken.description: Short-lived temp token from admin login when 2FA is required

deviceId.description: Stable browser/device identifier used to keep one active admin session per device.

rememberMe.description: When true, issue a long-lived refresh session (30 days). When false, session expires in 1 day.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token from the previous auth response

deviceId.description: Stable per-install device identifier for session deduplication.
Stable per-install device identifier used to keep one active session per device.

rememberMe.description: When true (default), issues a long-lived refresh session. When false, a shorter session-only refresh window.

reasonCode.description: Machine reason (e.g. REPORT_APPROVED, REPORT_APPROVAL_REVOKED, REPORT_SUBMITTED legacy, FIRST_REPORT legacy, EVENT_JOINED, EVENT_CHECK_IN)

reachedAt.description: When the new level was reached (ISO-8601)

levelTierKey.description: Tier key for client icons (e.g. numeric_3, prestige_01)

levelDisplayName.description: English display name; clients may localize via levelTierKey

milestones.description: Level-up moments derived from positive XP deltas (first page only)

nextCursor.description: Pass as `cursor` to fetch the next page

totalPointsEarned.description: Lifetime XP (level curve). Includes first-report awards and, when implemented, eco-action approval (+50) and completion (+100) via PointTransaction.

pointsInLevel.description: XP accumulated inside the current level

pointsToNextLevel.description: XP remaining until the next level

levelTierKey.description: Stable tier id for icons and localization (e.g. numeric_5, prestige_03, prestige_cap)

levelDisplayName.description: English tier title; clients may localize via levelTierKey

weeklyPoints.description: Sum of positive point credits for this user in the current Skopje week (all sources)

organizerCertifiedAt.description: Set when user passed the organizer toolkit quiz

homeLocationLabel.description: Optional geocoded label for home location

homeLocationSetAt.description: When home location was last saved, ISO-8601

termsAcceptedAt.description: ISO-8601 when terms were last accepted

requiresTermsAcceptance.description: True when the user must accept current terms (missing or outdated acceptance)

termsVersion.description: Terms version being accepted; defaults to server TERMS_VERSION

termsAcceptedAt.description: ISO-8601 when terms were last accepted

requiresTermsAcceptance.description: True when the user must accept current terms (missing or outdated acceptance)

locale.description: Authoritative app UI locale for notifications (en | mk | sq).

questionId.description: Question id from the quiz session payload

selectedOptionId.description: Selected option id for that question

userId.description: Present only for the current user (privacy)

avatarUrl.description: Signed avatar URL when the user opted into the public leaderboard

weekEndsAt.description: Week end (Sunday end of day Europe/Skopje), ISO-8601

myRank.description: 1-based rank among users with weekly points > 0; null if none

myWeeklyPoints.description: Current user’s sum of positive point credits for this Skopje week (all sources)

policyReason.description: Policy reason for audit trail (required for dismiss/escalate/hide/restore)

description.description: Short report context for the created site.

heroMediaUrls.description: Canonical hero image from earliest approved report with media

statuses.description: Restrict hits to these workflow statuses (map filter parity)

includeArchived.description: When true, include admin-archived sites in results

pollutionTypes.description: Restrict to sites whose latest report category is one of these (API strings)

status.description: Target status when action is set_status

archived.description: Archive flag when action is set_archived

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key for safe retries (stored in audit metadata only).

token.description: Opaque signed share token from share URL

eventType.description: Attribution event type (CLICK on web, OPEN in-app)

deviceId.description: Device id (falls back to X-Device-Id header)

isDeleted.description: True when the actor account was deleted or purged.

nextBeforeId.description: Cursor for the next page (entry id)

summary.description: Present on the first page only; null on paginated follow-up requests.

note.description: Free-form admin note shown on the site timeline

occurredAt.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp for when the note occurred

body.example: Thanks for reporting this. I can help this weekend.

parentId.description: Parent comment id for nested reply

title.description: Headline from canonical hero report or first approved report

siteLabel.description: City / area line (same rules as mobile siteName)

id.description: Opaque stable row id (not raw userId for non-moderators)

archived.description: Whether site should be archived by admin moderation

reason.example: Resolved and hidden from default map view after municipal cleanup verification.

reason.description: Required when rejecting a resolution submission.

urls.description: HTTPS object URLs (or keys when virtual-hosted base is unset) for uploaded images

reportNumber.description: Human-friendly report number for queue operations

name.description: Short descriptive title for the report

location.description: High-level location label used in tables

dateReportedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the report was created

isPotentialDuplicate.description: Whether this report is flagged as a potential duplicate

coReporterCount.description: Number of additional co-reporters attached to this report

cleanupEffortLabel.description: Citizen estimate of cleanup team size, when provided

reportNumber.description: Human-friendly report number for queue operations

title.description: Short descriptive title for the report

location.description: High-level location label used in tables

submittedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the report was created

coReporterCount.description: Number of additional co-reporters attached to this report

mediaCount.description: Number of media assets attached to this report

totalReports.description: Total reports in the duplicate group including the primary report

sessionId.description: Stable per-tab session id generated by the admin client

displayName.description: Display name shown to other moderators viewing the same report

reason.description: Required when moving a report to DELETED (moderation narrative). Ignored for other statuses.
reason.example: Evidence was insufficient to verify this report.

moderatorId.description: Target moderator user id; omit to assign to the authenticated moderator

unassign.description: When true, clears the current assignee without changing report status

childReportIds.description: IDs of child duplicate reports to merge into the primary report

reason.example: Merged duplicate reports after manual verification.

reportedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this person originally submitted their report

mergedMediaCount.description: Number of duplicate report media objects removed from storage (best-effort S3 deletes)

coReporters.description: Co-reporters on the primary report after merge (original submitters of merged duplicates)

reporterCount.description: Total distinct people who reported this issue (primary reporter + co-reporters)

isPotentialDuplicate.description: Whether this report is flagged as a potential duplicate

coReporters.description: Additional reporters who also submitted this report

potentialDuplicateOfReportNumber.description: Report number of the primary report this one is considered a potential duplicate of, if any

cleanupEffortLabel.description: Citizen estimate of cleanup team size, when provided

address.description: Structured place line when available (not the report narrative)

description.description: Optional extra context from the reporter

reporterIsDeleted.description: True when the primary reporter account was erased

pointsAwarded.description: Points awarded when admin approved (0 if pending/denied)

cleanupEffort.description: Cleanup effort (ONE_TO_TWO, THREE_TO_FIVE, …) when citizen provided it

viewerRole.description: Viewer is primary reporter or co-reporter (points apply to primary only)

moderationReason.description: Moderator rejection reason and optional notes when status is DELETED; null for other statuses

title.description: Short headline for lists and moderation
title.example: Illegal dump behind the bus station

description.example: Waste has been accumulating for several weeks.

address.description: Reverse-geocoded or user-confirmed place line (not the report narrative)

cleanupEffort.description: Estimated cleanup team size for organizers

isNewSite.description: True if a new site was created, false if linked to existing site

pointsAwarded.description: Net report-scoped XP for this submission (0 on create). Points are granted when moderators approve; idempotent replay returns the same net if the ledger changed.

pointsBreakdown.description: Breakdown from the latest approval grant metadata (or legacy submit grant) when available

creditsAvailable.description: Number of standard report credits currently available

emergencyAvailable.description: Whether emergency report allowance is currently available

retryAfterSeconds.description: Seconds until emergency allowance is available again; null when already available

nextEmergencyReportAvailableAt.description: UTC instant (ISO-8601) when emergency reporting becomes available again; null when not on cooldown

nextRefillAtMs.description: Epoch milliseconds when emergency allowance refills (same instant as nextEmergencyReportAvailableAt); null when not on cooldown

unlockHint.description: Human guidance on how to unlock more reports

note.description: Optional moderator note for status change

token.description: Single-use invite token from the email link

totpCode.description: Required when completing TOTP enrollment during invite accept; omit to skip 2FA

at.description: ISO-8601 instant when the participant joined

cumulativeJoiners.description: Running total of participants joined up to and including this point

attendanceRate.description: Attendance rate as a percentage (0–100), from check-in rows vs joiners

joinersCumulative.description: One point per join, ordered by time, with running cumulative count

checkInsByHour.description: Exactly 24 entries (hours 0–23 UTC), zeros where no check-ins

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 instant when this analytics snapshot was generated

lastJoinAt.description: ISO-8601 instant of the most recent participant join

lastCheckInAt.description: ISO-8601 instant of the most recent check-in

declineReason.description: Required when action is DECLINED (shared reason for all rows in this job).

clientJobId.description: Client-generated UUID; duplicate values return 409 for this actor.

endAt.description: When omitted, end is set to the same local wall time on the next calendar day (Europe/Skopje).

recurrenceRule.description: Optional recurrence rule (RFC 5545). Stored as metadata for this single event.

status.description: PENDING for user-created (requires admin approval), APPROVED for admin-created

endAt.description: Empty string clears endAt (legacy rows only).

recurrenceRule.description: Optional recurrence rule (RFC 5545). Empty string clears.

lifecycleStatus.description: Admin-only lifecycle correction (e.g. cancel a published event)

status.description: Moderation status: APPROVED, DECLINED, or PENDING (return-to-pending)

declineReason.description: Required when declining a pending event (stored on event and in audit metadata)

siteDistanceKm.description: Distance from request point to site (km), 0 when coords absent

activeCheckInSessionId.description: Check-in session id when set (Prisma cuid)

status.description: Comma-separated lifecycle filters (same as GET /events status)

recurrenceRule.description: RFC 5545 RRULE string (without the "RRULE:" prefix). Max 52 occurrences enforced server-side.

recurrenceCount.description: How many occurrences to create (1–52). Ignored when recurrenceRule is absent.

isDeleted.description: True when the participant account was deleted

avatarUrl.description: Signed HTTPS URL for profile photo when the user has an avatar

joinedAt.description: When the user joined the event (ISO-8601)

nextCursor.description: Pass as cursor for the next page

siteLabel.description: City / area line (same rules as mobile siteName)

reportedBagsCollected.description: Canonical bags from live metric (0 if unset)

asOf.description: ISO timestamp when this payload was assembled

routeWaypoints.description: When set, replaces the entire route for this event (may be empty to clear)

siteDistanceKm.description: Distance from request point to site (km), 0 when coords absent

activeCheckInSessionId.description: Check-in session id when set (Prisma cuid)

pointsAwarded.description: Gamification points awarded for this join (0 if replay)

status.description: Target lifecycle status (organizer-only, valid transitions enforced)

qrPayload.description: Opaque signed payload to encode in the QR bitmap

sessionId.description: Active check-in session id (must match token claim s)

issuedAtMs.description: Token iat in milliseconds since epoch

userId.description: User id when not a guest row

avatarUrl.description: Short-lived signed URL for profile photo when present

hasMore.description: Whether more rows exist after this page

nextCursor.description: Pass as `cursor` query param on the next request

pointsAwarded.description: Credits awarded for this check-in (0 if duplicate)

status.description: Volunteer must wait for organizer when pending_confirmation

expiresAt.description: ISO expiry for the pending request
ISO expiry when status is pending

isOpen.description: Whether attendee QR check-in is active

userId.description: User id of a volunteer who joined the event (EventParticipant row must exist)

qrPayload.description: Raw QR string from organizer (signed v2 token)

redeemLatitude.description: Optional attendee GPS latitude (WGS84) for anti-gaming signals

action.description: Organizer action on the pending check-in request

muted.description: True to mute push notifications for this event chat

avatarUrl.description: Signed HTTPS URL when the author has a profile photo

clientMessageId.description: Echo of client idempotency key when the client supplied one

isOwnMessage.description: True when the current user authored this message

editedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the message was last edited

pinnedByDisplayName.description: Display name of user who pinned (when pinned)

typing.description: Whether the user is currently typing in this chat

lastReadMessageId.description: Last message id the user has read (clears unread for messages at or before it)

lat.description: Center latitude for map-style queries (or chat location pins)

lng.description: Center longitude for map-style queries (or chat location pins)

body.example: See you at the north entrance
body.description: Plain text. May be empty when sending only attachments (e.g. voice) or a location pin.

replyToId.description: Parent message id for a reply thread (Prisma cuid)

attachments.description: Pre-uploaded attachment metadata (from /chat/upload). Each item has url, mimeType, fileName, sizeBytes, width, height.

clientMessageId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 for idempotent sends (safe retries after network loss)

pinned.description: True to pin, false to unpin

weekEndsAt.description: Week end (Sunday end of day Europe/Skopje), ISO-8601

pendingCount.description: Report side-effect outbox rows awaiting processing

perReplica.description: Worker heartbeats are per ECS task / process replica
